action.reasoning: Observation: reverting to the earlier stateful heuristic recovered local dense proxies to safe_follow_steps 28.0 over 10 episodes, which is the best local result so far and better than the prior eval baseline safe_follow_steps 16.9, though nav_seek_success remains 0. Analysis: the current bottleneck is not infrastructure but whether this recovered controller actually improves on the full 50-episode eval. Given the task guidance, we should not spend more iterations on speculative rewrites before measuring the real harness score of the best-so-far controller. Runtime is acceptable (~10 min for train + local test), and we still have ample budget. Decision: submit the current checkpoint for evaluation now to get a true score and decide whether further near-band tuning is worthwhile.
